Team Contributors

Name Email Location Status Payout {contributors.map((person) => ( {person.name} {person.email} {person.location} {person.status} {person.balance} ))} Total ₹1,08,500

_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: ContributorsOverviewTable
_meta.description: The ContributorsOverviewTable component presents a clean, structured, and interactive summary of contributors within a team or project. Designed for clarity and ease of use, this table highlights essential details like contributor names, email addresses, geographic locations, account status, and individual payout balances. Visual cues such as colored status badges enhance readability, while responsive hover states provide a polished user experience
